2026-04-13T02:24:19.8214214Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8219614Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8223468Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8224101Z 
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8224499Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8228467Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8229060Z 
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8229317Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8229706Z 
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8229934Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8230284Z 
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8230489Z   git switch -
2026-04-13T02:24:19.8230762Z
